---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or addition
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem this solves

Describe the specific problem or limitation you are running into. Focus on the situation, not the solution.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you want to happen. If you have a concrete design in mind, explain it here. If you are open to alternatives, say so.

## Alternatives considered

List any other approaches you evaluated and why you did not choose them.

## Scope check

Confirm that this request relates to the memory layer or connector system. Features unrelated to the OpenMemory architecture (general-purpose tooling, unrelated integrations, UI redesigns outside the memory inspector) are out of scope for this repository.

- [ ] This request relates to the memory layer (ICP canister, memory classification, storage, retrieval) or to the connector or agent system.
